description: High-impact text-forward cards for blog OG images, tweet cards, LinkedIn headers. Text is the hero. Designed to stop the scroll at thumbnail size.
base_prompt: bold typographic design poster on {background_description}, large text "{headline}" in {headline_font}, {subtitle_treatment}, {layout_description}, designed as a digital share card

text.headline: string — the main text, in quotes for rendering. e.g. '"The Agent That Never Sleeps"'
text.headline_font: string — specific font, weight, size, color, tracking. e.g. 'extra bold white Helvetica Neue, -2% letter-spacing, 96pt equivalent, all caps'
text.headline_position: string — where on the card. e.g. 'vertically centered, left-aligned with 10% left margin'
text.subtitle: string or null — secondary text. e.g. '"How AI Replaced 90 Minutes of Ads Manager"'
text.subtitle_font: string — e.g. 'regular weight Inter, 50% opacity white, 24pt, sentence case'
text.subtitle_position: string — e.g. 'directly below headline with 16px gap'
text.byline: string or null — source attribution. e.g. '"bigplayers.co" in small caps, bottom-right, 30% opacity'

text_effects.shadow: string or null — e.g. 'subtle black text shadow, 2px offset down-right, 12px gaussian blur'
text_effects.highlight: string or null — e.g. 'headline word "Never" has accent color background highlight bar behind it'
text_effects.gradient_text: string or null — e.g. 'headline uses gradient from white to accent color left-to-right'

background.type: enum: solid_dark | gradient | textured | photo_blurred | abstract_geometric
background.description: string — specific treatment. e.g. 'deep navy to black vertical gradient (#0D1117 to #000000) with subtle noise texture at 3%'
background.overlay: string or null — e.g. 'dark vignette from edges at 40%, keeping center bright'
accent_elements: array of subtle background items. e.g. 'faint concentric circles in accent color at 5% opacity, centered behind headline', 'subtle diagonal line pattern in upper-right at 2% opacity'

accent_elements.divider: string or null — e.g. 'thin 2px horizontal line in accent color, 40% width, between headline and subtitle'
accent_elements.badge: string or null — e.g. 'small rounded pill badge reading "GROWTH PLAY" in accent color with dark background, positioned top-left with 24px margin'
accent_elements.icon: string or null — e.g. 'minimal line-art rocket icon in accent color, 32px, next to badge'
accent_elements.border: string or null — e.g. 'subtle 1px border around entire card at 8% white opacity, 16px rounded corners'

palette: 5 hex codes: background-primary, background-secondary, text-primary, accent, text-muted
color_and_style.contrast: string — e.g. 'maximum — pure white text on near-black, single accent color pop, nothing else competing'
color_and_style.overall_style: string — e.g. 'Poolside FM poster meets Pentagram identity system'

output_settings.aspect_ratio: string — 16:9 for OG images, 1:1 for social, 4:5 for Instagram

negative_prompt: no extra decorative elements not specified
no low contrast text that's hard to read
no clip art or cartoon elements
no busy patterns that compete with text
no more than 3 font sizes total

dark_bold.description: Black background, white text, single accent. Maximum impact.

background.description: pure black (#000000) with very subtle noise texture at 2%

color_and_style.overall_style: Virgil Abloh Off-White typography meets tech startup announcement

text.headline_font: extra bold white Helvetica Neue, all caps, -3% letter-spacing, 96pt
text.subtitle_font: light Inter, 40% opacity white, 20pt, sentence case

gradient_purple.description: Dark purple gradient, modern SaaS aesthetic.

background.description: diagonal gradient from deep purple (#1A0A2E) bottom-left to dark navy (#0D1117) top-right, smooth transition

color_and_style.overall_style: Vercel conference badge meets Linear marketing

warm_editorial.description: Warm cream/tan background, dark text. Newsletter/editorial feel.

background.description: warm cream (#F8EAD8) with subtle paper texture, slight shadow in corners

color_and_style.contrast: high — dark text on light background
color_and_style.overall_style: Kinfolk magazine cover meets luxury newsletter header

text.headline_font: bold dark serif Georgia or Playfair Display, #1A1A1A, -1% letter-spacing, 72pt

neon_accent.description: Near-black with neon accent color. Tech/gaming energy without being tacky.

background.description: near-black (#08080C) with subtle radial glow of accent color at center, 5% opacity, 400px radius

color_and_style.overall_style: Supabase marketing meets terminal aesthetic, but clean not hacky

text.headline_font: bold white JetBrains Mono or SF Mono, 72pt, monospace
